name: Turkey Cheese Veggie
recipeIngredient: 2 cups broccoli flowers and stem (dice stem)
1.5 cups 1% milk (or 1/2 and 1/2, or just milk with a bit of sour cream added)
gourmet mixed pepper or fresh ground black pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare pie crust using your favorite recipe.
2. Fry onions and celery in butter until tender. Add cubed turkey and fry for a minute or two.
3. Add diced broccoli stems, carrots, sage, and pepper. Peas would be a nice addition.
4. Make the sauce by creating a roux with 2 tbsp. flour and 1/4 cup butter. Gradually add the whipping cream and milk, stirring over low heat until thickened. Add more milk if needed.
5. Stir in cubed cheeses until melted. Season with pepper and salt.
6. Combine the sauce with pie filling and broccoli flowers.
7. Fill the pie shell, cover with crust, brush edges with an egg/milk mixture, and pierce a couple of places with a fork.
8. Bake at 350 degrees for approximately one hour.
